title: hymenocallis undulata
intro: Hymenocallis undulata, also known as the Eastern Swamp Lily or Tiger Lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hymenocallis undulata include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots can be dried and used to make powder for medicinal purposes.
